summary: Comprehensive test suite for config.Load function: validates YAML parsing, defaults, validation rules, backward compatibility, and source types (RSS, Reddit, HackerNews)
notes: 40 test functions covering: config structure parsing (Telegram, Storage, OpenRouter, LLM, Refresh, Sources), default values (OpenRouter model, refresh interval), validation rules (refresh interval minimum enforcement, required fields), backward compatibility (openrouter→llm migration), multiple source types (RSS requires URL, Reddit requires subreddit, HackerNews requires feed), LLM providers (Ollama default URL, OpenRouter requires API key), and error handling. Helper function writeTestConfig creates temp files for each test.
